title: The Wedding Invitation
content: When Noah received a wedding invitation from an old friend, he almost decided not to attend. It had been years since he had spoken to many of the guests. At the reception, however, he unexpectedly met Grace, someone he had admired in college but never had the courage to know better. They spent the evening talking between dances and laughing about forgotten memories. By the end of the celebration, Noah realized the invitation had brought him something far more valuable than a pleasant weekend. It had introduced him to a new beginning hidden inside an old chapter.
